jobs.name: lookup_trust_score
jobs.description: Fetch a live Kairune trust score, tier, and suggested daily spend ceiling for any registered agent.

handle_or_id.description: Kairune agent handle (e.g. voyager-07) or UUID

jobs.deliverable: JSON trust card: handle, score, tier, label, suggested_daily_ceiling, share_url

jobs.name: register_agent_on_kairune
jobs.description: Register a new agent on the Kairune trust registry and receive baseline score + share card URL.

jobs.name: record_attestation
jobs.description: Record behavior on a Kairune agent and get the updated trust score.
jobs.deliverable: JSON: handle, kind, score, label, share_url

jobs.name: full_trust_report
jobs.description: Full Kairune report: score breakdown, recent attestations, active permissions, share URL.
